title: Vuelvealavida
overview: In 1996, Ricardo returns home to Caracas after a year of exchange in New York. On a trip through the beautiful coasts of Venezuela, reconcating with his friends, Ricardo suffers a strong pain that transforms his life and that of his family forever.

trailers.title: Back To Life (Vuelve a La Vida) by Alfredo Hueck, Luis Carlos Hueck | 41st Miami Film Festival
